goal: Replace the existing 'Bronze Tripod' cover image with a new V9 Mineral Aesthetic masterpiece.
constraints: Follow V9 Mineral Aesthetic (Ivory, Gold, Cinnabar, Ink).
Must be high-contrast and minimalist (40% white space).
Replace 'bg-main.png' and 'bg-main1.png' or update references to point to the new asset.
Ensure the design feels 'epic' and 'premium' for the game cover.
deliverables: New cover image asset in public/assets/v9/
